title: 12inch Heavy Duty Trampoline Tents Anchor Ground Pegs - Galvanized Steel Rust-Proof J Hook Rebar Stakes Fit Trampolines Camp Garden Shed Swings with Chisel Point End
features: DIMENSION - Stake is 11.61 inches length; 3/8 inch in diameter.The hook is 2.17 inches length. And the opening width is 1.5 inch.

RUSTPROOF GALVANIZED STEEL - 6Packs ground anchor tent stakes are made of heavy duty steel rebar that is reliable and long-lasting in outdoor use . J-hook design can help to reinforce the sturdiness of the installation. Premium quality makes the hook glossy and not easy rust or corroded and makes them durable and can be reused many times.

HOW TO USE -The chisel pointed end enables yard stakes steel penetrate into the ground easily without much effort.You can step on it or use mallet hammer to make it deeper. No auxiliary tools required,the chisel pointed end makes the rebar stakes penetrate into the ground easily.You can step on it to make the rebar stake penetrate deeper into the ground.
NO TOOL REQUIRED - Chisel pointed ends are suitable for hard dirt, grass, sand, hard clay and rocky soils. Metal stakes can go nice and deep and save effort.

MULTIPLE USAGE - Help to hold down the swing sets, trampoline, camping tents,hammock slides, fences, yard decorations, soccer goals, huge Christmas Outdoor Decoration, nets, landscape edging, garden trellises, gazebos, large canopy and more.
